module_mood_contract: No dedicated module mood contract — supplementary reference register. Boris-flat technical voice. Expected state on read: 'I now understand why context cleanliness is a quality concern, not a cost concern, and I have three concrete moves.' No arc obligation; does not need to set up the next module.

rules_evaluated.evidence: Maintainer block explicitly states 'Boris-flat for the mechanism, one Rory reframe at the open.' Body opens with the reframe (line 3: 'Token efficiency sounds like a cost problem. That framing is mostly wrong') and sustains Boris-flat register throughout. Trace phase 1 mood_score 8/10; close 8/10. Extended closing colophon (lines 87–91) deepens the irony without resolving it — doubled joke ('Twice over, on a page about not letting this happen') earns the close without flattening the mood. Contract held.

No punitive framing. 'The folklore' section (lines 53–61) names wrong models without shaming the practitioner who holds them. 'Almost nobody publishes their numbers' = epistemic uncertainty, not failure attribution. Persona reads with curiosity, not guilt.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Lead with discipline, not failure mode.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Opening frames 'signal-to-noise' and 'context engineering' as positive disciplines (lines 7–8). 'The folklore' section header names a category (not 'common mistakes'). Failure modes (bloated CLAUDE.md, wide fan-out) appear as negative cases under positive-discipline framing throughout.

Front-run check: supplementary does not name Huryn's three-block frame, STRIDE, Ronacher's three-pattern, or any downstream M4–M6 teaching moments — all intact. Big Idea fidelity: AE101 strategy §Terminology ('memory compounds, context feeds it') is honoured — body explicitly marks ./CLAUDE.md as paid-every-turn memory (line 51), not context; 'context engineering' is used for the window (lines 7–8), consistent with strategy doc's load-bearing distinction. Mood-doesn't-resolve-early: no arc position; 'Now go clean your window' close is a practical send-off, not a hook that resolves tension belonging to a downstream module. Module-to-module arc: N/A for supplementary reference (no arc obligation stated in strategy §Supplementary material); close is appropriately register-flat.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategic themes recur in Key Concepts.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Rule governs Key Concepts bullets in module files. Supplementary reference pages carry no Key Concepts section. N/A by surface type.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing functions stay, scripted reactions go. Forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Single fenced prompt block (lines 25–31) is self-contained in fence. Body prose around it ('Ask Claude to price the bloat', line 21) is a one-sentence action lead-in, not the forcing function itself. No count-scripts, scripted-reaction prose, or authored-conversation beats found anywhere in student-facing body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Classroom = default delivery; body teaches work, trainer manages room.
rules_evaluated.evidence: No group-share, discuss-with, pause-cue, or room-harvest sentence in body above maintainer block. Every sentence addresses the work (tokens, window, moves, cost). Closing aside (lines 87–91) is authorial wink in text — not a cohort-management cue; maintainer block explicitly says 'Closing italic aside is deliberate — do not strip as session-biography' (line 116).
